name: Random Box
uniques: Provides [+1] [C1] <with [80]% chance>
Provides [+1] [C1] <with [75]% chance> <when number of [C1] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [C1] <with [66]% chance> <when number of [C1] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [C1] <with [50]% chance> <when number of [C1] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V01] <when number of [C1] is equal to [0]>
Provides [+1] [V01] <with [75]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [V01] <with [66]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [V01] <with [50]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V02] <when number of [C1] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [V02] <with [75]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [V02] <with [66]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [V02] <with [50]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V03] <when number of [C1] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [V03] <with [75]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [V03] <with [66]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [V03] <with [50]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V04] <when number of [C1] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V04] <with [75]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [1]>
Provides [+1] [V04] <with [66]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [2]>
Provides [+1] [V04] <with [50]% chance> <when number of [V01] is equal to [3]>
Provides [+1] [V05] <when number of [C1] is equal to [4]>
